prompt:
Design a premium SaaS landing page for 'Onboard AI', an AI-powered onboarding assistant that helps SaaS startups reduce user churn by 60%.

HERO SECTION:
- A bold hero with the headline 'Stoppez la perte d utilisateurs' (French)
- A STUNNING visual centerpiece: a floating 3D-style glassmorphic dashboard mockup with onboarding UI elements visible inside it: chat bubbles, progress bars, step indicators, glowing accents
- The dashboard mockup should appear to float in space with subtle shadows and reflections
- Animated gradient mesh background behind the dashboard (indigo, violet, cyan flowing colors)
- Two CTA buttons: 'Voir la demo interactive' (primary, gradient indigo-violet) and 'Tester le chatbot' (secondary, outlined)
- A small red badge above the headline: '60% des nouveaux inscrits abandonnent en 7 jours'

PROBLEM SECTION:
- Title: 'Votre onboarding tue la croissance'
- 3 glass stat cards in a row with large numbers: '40-60%' (churn semaine 1), '45 min' (avant premiere valeur), '0 EUR' (revenus perdus)
- Cards have subtle gradient borders and glassmorphism effect

SOLUTION SECTION:
- Title: 'Onboarding propulse par l IA'
- 4 feature cards in a grid with custom gradient SVG icons (not generic Lucide)
- Features: Guidage personnalise, Reponses en direct, 5x plus rapide, Impact mesurable
- Each card has a unique gradient accent color

BEFORE/AFTER SECTION:
- Side by side comparison
- Left card (red accent): 'Sans onboarding IA' with X marks
- Right card (green accent, with glow): 'Avec onboarding IA' with checkmarks

CTA SECTION:
- Large glass card with gradient glow
- 'Envie de ca pour votre SaaS?'
- Gradient CTA button

FOOTER:
- Minimal, single line

STYLE:
- Color base: #0F172A (deep navy, NOT pure black)
- Surface: #1E293B
- Gradient accents: indigo #6366F1 to violet #8B5CF6 to cyan #06B6D4
- Text: Off-white #F1F5F9, muted #94A3B8
- Typography: Syne (headings), Geist (body)
- Glass effects with backdrop-blur
- Subtle animated backgrounds (gradient mesh, floating orbs)
- Fine grid overlay texture
- The design should feel like Linear.app meets Vercel.com: premium, sophisticated, NOT generic
- Every element should have depth: no flat cards, use shadows, borders, and layering
- The hero visual (floating dashboard) is the KEY differentiator: make it the showpiece
- Framework: Tailwind CSS v4 utility classes
